summary: Chat application with group settings member management. User wants to add members from conversations (not by principal ID) in group settings.

existing_features.title: In the group settings panel (inside GroupChatPage), replace the current principal-ID-based member input with a searchable list of users derived from the current user's existing direct message conversations. Display each conversation contact by their display name and username. Allow the group admin/creator to select one or more contacts from this list and add them as group members.

new_feature_requests.summary: In group settings, allow adding members from existing conversations instead of by principal ID
